# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and performance improvements** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates to Skia milestone m151 and delivers several zero-allocation performance fixes. This release advances the bundled Skia engine to m151, fixes WASM build compatibility, and improves performance across HarfBuzzSharp and SKColor parsing with allocation-free code paths.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — The bundled Skia engine advances to m151, bringing upstream rendering improvements, bug fixes, and performance work. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **Upstream m151 bug fixes merged** — Additional cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m151 branch have been merged for improved stability. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382))
- **WASM build compatibility restored** — A Skia submodule fix drops an SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition that caused WebAssembly build failures. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing optimized with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — SKColor hex parsing is rewritten for speed and two new ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads are added, reducing allocations in hot parsing paths. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **Unnecessary unsafe modifier removed from GRContextOptions** — The unsafe modifier on GRContextOptions has been removed where it was not required, improving API clarity. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — A native resource leak that occurred when calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) is now correctly disposed. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Delivers two allocation-free performance improvements: Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder to avoid per-call allocations, and Tag.Parse eliminates its per-call char[4] array.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Fixed the WASM build by bumping the Skia submodule to drop the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition, and contributed the cross-backend golden-image visual regression test harness ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340)) |

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 updated the bundled Skia engine to milestone m151, restored WASM build compatibility, added SKColor span overloads, removed the unsafe modifier from GRContextOptions, and fixed a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
